Episode: 1
Scene: 06 — แม่กอดลูกสู้คำกล่าวหา

Visual style: stylized hand-blown glass figurine Thai melodrama characters matching the Stage 2 character sheets: translucent glossy glass bodies, smooth reflective surfaces, visible glass thickness, soft internal glow, delicate colored-glass details, rounded toy-like proportions, simplified expressive glass-doll faces; high-end anime painted background environments, vertical 9:16, no realistic human skin
Attached image order for this scene: @img1 = Adult Thao, @img2 = Glass Sprout 999
Characters visible in this shot only: @img1 (Adult Thao), @img2 (Glass Sprout 999)
English scene description: Adult Thao (the mother) hugs the white glass sprout with tears in her eyes, with her eyes open but looking deeply sorrowful. Thai melodrama fantasy scene with emotionally readable acting, clear blocking, and continuity with the previous scene.
Prompt:
Create a vertical 9:16 cinematic image for a Thai melodrama fantasy short drama. Show Adult Thao (the mother) hugging the white glass sprout while having tears in her eyes, with her eyes open but looking deeply sorrowful. All visible characters are stylized hand-blown glass figurines matching the attached character sheets, with translucent glossy glass bodies, visible glass thickness, reflective surfaces, simplified expressive glass-doll faces, delicate internal glow, and no realistic human skin. Use high-end hand-painted 2D anime background art with soft painterly gradients, luminous cinematic light, atmospheric depth, detailed props from the scene, rich natural colors, and polished feature-film anime background finish. Compose the shot so the emotional conflict is instantly readable. Keep only the listed characters visible in frame. Maintain prop continuity and character color identity from the reference sheets.
Negative prompt:
no text overlay, no subtitles, no watermark, no logo, no real human, no live-action actor, no realistic human skin, no pores, no flesh, no photoreal person, no Thai drama actor

video_prompts_10:
Episode: 1
Scene: 01.5 — ป้าย 999 ในมือพ่อ (Wide Angle)

Visual style: stylized hand-blown glass figurine Thai melodrama characters matching the Stage 2 character sheets: translucent glossy glass bodies, smooth reflective surfaces, visible glass thickness, soft internal glow, delicate colored-glass details, rounded toy-like proportions, simplified expressive glass-doll faces; high-end anime painted background environments, vertical 9:16, no realistic human skin
Attached image order for this scene: @img1 = Adult Thao, @img2 = Adult Natee, @img3 = Glass Cabbage Sprout Army
Characters visible in this shot only: @img1 (Adult Thao), @img2 (Adult Natee), @img3 (Glass Cabbage Sprout Army)
English scene description: ภาพ wide-angle เห็นนทีตอนโตยืนสั่นขณะถือป้ายหมายเลข 999 เต็มตัว ฉากหลังเป็นวอร์ดหน่อผักกาดแก้วและมีเทาตอนโตยืนอยู่. Thai melodrama fantasy scene with emotionally readable acting, clear blocking, and continuity with the previous scene.
Dialogue context / intended Thai spoken emotion: นทีตอนโต: “เก้าร้อยเก้าสิบเก้าคน...นี่มันลูกหรือหนี้ทั้งชีวิต!”
Prompt:
Create a vertical 9:16 cinematic image for a Thai melodrama fantasy short drama. Start with a wide establishing shot: Adult Natee stands trembling while gripping a numbered “999” hospital tag; full-body forms are visible, showing Adult Thao and rows of Glass Cabbage Sprout Army cradles clearly in the luminous anime hospital ward background. Make the wide shot reveal the full emotional shock and the scale of the situation. All visible characters are stylized hand-blown glass figurines matching the attached character sheets, with translucent glossy glass bodies, visible glass thickness, reflective surfaces, simplified expressive glass-doll faces, delicate internal glow, and no realistic human skin. Use high-end hand-painted 2D anime background art with soft painterly gradients, luminous cinematic light, atmospheric depth, detailed props from the scene, rich natural colors, and polished feature-film anime background finish. Compose the shot so the emotional conflict is instantly readable. Keep only the listed characters visible in frame. Maintain prop continuity and character color identity from the reference sheets.
Negative prompt:
no text overlay, no subtitles, no watermark, no logo, no real human, no live-action actor, no realistic human skin, no pores, no flesh, no photoreal person, no Thai drama actor
